home.subtitle: The first platform that teaches you European Portuguese from any language or dialect you speak. AI-powered, human-supported.

universal_input.title: The Universal Input
universal_input.subtitle: Learning from Irish? Irish Gaelic? Mandarin? Just type it. Our AI bridges the gap.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Got questions about European Portuguese? Our flock is here to help you soar.
contact.faq_q1: How quickly will I get a reply?
contact.faq_a1: We usually reply within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, use WhatsApp for fastest response.
contact.faq_q2: Do you offer custom plans for schools?
contact.faq_a2: Yes! We have special educational packages for schools and language institutes. Send us a message to discuss your needs.
contact.faq_a3: Absolutely! We love hearing user suggestions. Many of our best features came directly from user requests.
contact.faq_q4: Is Multi Lingo AI really 100% remote?
contact.faq_a4: Yes! We are a fully distributed team working from beaches, cafes and co-working spaces around the world. No office, no dress code, just great language learning.
